text.title: Freelancer Positioning Content Calendar Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Freelancer Positioning Content Calendar end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: extract-pillars
step.action: Pull 3-5 pillars from the positioning artefact.

step.name: harvest-topics
step.action: Generate ≥40 candidate topics from real work.

step.name: map-weeks
step.action: Map weeks 1-52 to pillar + topic; rotate evenly.
